name: Standard 10-turn intake bench
description: Fixed clinician prompts for every model. Same portrait (Jordan Blake), Full image framing. After all 10 turns finish, capture automated stats then enter manual fidelity scores.

turns.text: Hi Alan, thanks for coming in. How are you feeling today?
Can you tell me where exactly the pain is located?
How long has this been going on?
On a scale from one to ten, how bad is the pain right now?
Does anything make it worse, like bending or lifting?
Have you tried any treatments or medication so far?
Does the pain wake you up at night?
Any numbness, tingling, or weakness in your legs?
Okay. In your own words, what are you hoping to get out of today's visit?
Thanks Alan. Before we wrap up, is there anything else you want me to know?
